channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 56/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 56/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 4.8%.

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Streeting resigns as health secretary but stops short of launching leadership bid - UK politics live
item.description: Streeting resigns as health secretary but stops short of launching leadership bid - UK politics live

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Reeves warns ‘now is not the time’ for change as rumours swirl about Labour leadership contest
item.description: Reeves warns ‘now is not the time’ for change as rumours swirl about Labour leadership contest

item.title: Byline Times: 10,000 People Sign Official Petition Demanding Government End ‘Capture of UK Democracy by Media Billionaires’
item.description: 10,000 People Sign Official Petition Demanding Government End ‘Capture of UK Democracy by Media Billionaires’

item.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: Really good on what Wes Streeting's policy record is actually like:
item.description: Really good on what Wes Streeting's policy record is actually like:

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Streeting has heralded the end of the Starmer premiership – but he’s unlikely to win the crown
item.description: Streeting has heralded the end of the Starmer premiership – but he’s unlikely to win the crown

item.title: BBC Politics: Watch: Streeting's resigned - what now?
Guardian (Open Platform): Wes Streeting’s resignation letter – what he said and what he meant
item.description: Wes Streeting’s resignation letter – what he said and what he meant

item.title: BBC Politics: Dale Vince admits 'crazy' thought of becoming Prime Minister
item.description: Dale Vince admits 'crazy' thought of becoming Prime Minister

item.title: Independent UK Politics: ‘Where we need vision, we have a vacuum’: Wes Streeting’s scathing resignation letter in full
item.description: ‘Where we need vision, we have a vacuum’: Wes Streeting’s scathing resignation letter in full

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Wes Streeting quits cabinet and calls on Starmer to resign
item.description: Wes Streeting quits cabinet and calls on Starmer to resign
